params_used.custom_text: // Converts a 7-bit binary input into an 8-bit Binary-Coded Decimal (BCD) output. The module accepts a clock signal and a 7-bit input, storing the input value on the falling edge of the clock. It then interprets the stored value, mapping ranges of 10 (from 0 to 90) to BCD representation in the lower 4 bits, while the upper 4 bits represent the remaining value less than 10.
